message:
fix(onboard): Remove fake stats, duplicate constant, improve extraction prompt

- Remove hardcoded placeholder stats (100 conversations, 1000 messages)
  that gave misleading information; now returns 0 with clear comments
- Remove duplicate RULE_CATEGORIES constant; now imports from gap-analysis.ts
- Update extraction prompt to recommend batch add with --check flag
